description: Pedagogical framework from The-Curriculum-of-Everything-Earth. Cognitive development theory grounded in nature-based learning.

framework.mission: Reconnect learners with the universal language of nature, pattern, and relationship — across art, science, technology, and self.
framework.structure: Integrated living curriculum that grows like a forest and thinks like a network.

pillars.name: Character Development
pillars.notes: Character as principle alignment — maps to the 12 dodecahedral principles.

pillars.name: Kid-AI Communication
pillars.notes: Communication as encoding — maps to octahedral state transmission.

pillars.name: Nature-Based Pedagogy
pillars.notes: Nature as teacher — maps to the 20 icosahedral families of discovery.

bio_cognitive_tools.purpose: Translate scientific concepts into nature-inspired lessons
